title: Elastic N.V. Ordinary Shares (ESTC) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Nasdaq listing for Elastic N.V. (ESTC) with earnings report dates and forecasts. Earnings Calendar: Most recent earnings announcement Q3 FY2026 (February 26, 2026). Next earnings expected Q4 FY2026 (May 28, 2026). Forward Earnings Estimates: Q4 FY2026 estimated EPS of $0.64, revenue of $445-447 million. Full-year FY2026 estimated EPS of $2.50-$2.54, revenue of $1.734-$1.736 billion. Historical Performance: The company has a track record of beating earnings expectations. Consistent revenue growth in the mid-teens to low-20% range. Operating margin expansion from 9% to 16%+ levels over recent years. Key Developments: Raised full-year guidance in Q3 due to strong execution. AI adoption driving incremental growth beyond base business. Large deal momentum with 30%+ growth in $1M+ commitments. Analyst Coverage: 23 analysts covering the stock. Consensus rating of Buy with diverse price targets. Growing institutional ownership and analyst interest.
